// Signal that dependencies are loading window.dependenciesLoading = true; try { const { IbiraAPIFetchManager } = await Promise.race([ import('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/mpbarbosa/ibira.js@0.4.22-alpha/dist/index.mjs'), new Promise((_, reject) => setTimeout(() => reject(new Error('CDN timeout after 5s')), 5000)) ]); window.IbiraAPIFetchManager = IbiraAPIFetchManager; console.log('✓ IbiraAPIFetchManager loaded successfully from CDN'); } catch (error) { console.warn('⚠️ Failed to load IbiraAPIFetchManager from CDN:', error.message); console.log('✓ Application will use fallback fetch implementation'); // App will use fallback - guia.js has IbiraAPIFetchManagerFallback } finally { // Signal that dependencies are ready window.dependenciesLoading = false; window.dispatchEvent(new Event('dependencies-ready')); }
